description: Replace arecord with pw-record (PipeWire native) to eliminate intermittent 0-590ms startup clipping that destroys the first 1-5 characters of speech

userStories.title: Replace arecord with pw-record in start_recording()
userStories.description: As a user, I want recording to use pw-record (PipeWire native) so there is no startup clipping that destroys the beginning of my speech.
acceptanceCriteria: start_recording() in voice_input.py uses pw-record instead of arecord
SIGTERM still used in stop_recording() (pw-record handles it correctly, produces valid WAV)
SAMPLE_RATE and CHANNELS constants still respected
Add arecord fallback: if pw-record not found (shutil.which), fall back to arecord with existing params
Log which recorder is used on first recording

userStories.title: Update unit tests for pw-record
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests to reflect the new pw-record default so CI stays green.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_integration.py: verify Popen is called with pw-record when pw-record is available
tests/conftest.py: cleanup fixture handles both pw-record and arecord processes
tests/test_process_cleanup.py: updated to handle pw-record process cleanup
All existing tests pass: pytest tests/ -x

userStories.title: E2E test: verify no startup clipping with pw-record
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an automated test proving pw-record eliminates startup clipping.
acceptanceCriteria: Test in tests/test_pw_record.py records 1s with pw-record, analyzes first 200ms RMS in 10ms chunks
No chunk in first 200ms has RMS >= 30000 (clipping threshold)
Test runs 5 trials for statistical confidence
Test requires pw-record available (skip if not)
